user.title: WhatsApp Add-on
user.description: Home Assistant will detect the local WhatsApp add-on automatically. Start the add-on and submit again if it is not detected yet.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure WhatsApp Add-on
reconfigure.description: Home Assistant will rediscover the local WhatsApp add-on automatically.

error.cannot_connect: Could not detect a running WhatsApp add-on.

abort.cannot_connect: Could not detect a running WhatsApp add-on.

cannot_connect.message: Could not connect to the WhatsApp add-on while running {action}.

not_configured.message: Set up the WhatsApp integration before calling this action.
